parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.notice', body: $('Parse Alert').first().json.emoji + ' [LibreNMS] ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.stateLabel + ': ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.hostname + ' \u2014 ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.ruleName + ($('Parse Alert').first().json.severity ? ' (' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.severity + ')' : '') + ($('Parse Alert').first().json.faultDetails ? '\n' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.faultDetails : ''), format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: '' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.emoji + ' [LibreNMS] ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.stateLabel + ': ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.hostname + ' \u2014 ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.ruleName + ($('Parse Alert').first().json.severity ? ' (' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.severity + ')' : '') + ($('Parse Alert').first().json.faultDetails ? '
' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.faultDetails + '
' : '') }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.text', body: '@openclaw use the exec tool to run: ./skills/infra-triage/infra-triage.sh ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.hostname + ' "' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.ruleName + '" ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.severity, format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: '@openclaw use the exec tool to run: ./skills/infra-triage/infra-triage.sh ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.hostname + ' "' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.ruleName + '" ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.severity + '' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $json.commentText || ('Alert re-fired at ' + new Date().toISOString()) }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $('Parse Alert').first().json.commentText || 'Recovery event' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ issues: [{ idReadable: $('Parse Alert').first().json.existingIssueId }], query: 'state To Verify' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.notice', body: '\u2705 All alerts cleared for ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.hostname + '. Issue ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.existingIssueId + ' moved to To Verify.', format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: '\u2705 All alerts cleared for ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.hostname + '. Issue ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.existingIssueId + ' moved to To Verify.' }) }}

parameters.command: ={{ "echo '" + $('Parse Alert').first().json.alertsB64 + "' | base64 -d > /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-alerts.json.tmp && mv /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-alerts.json.tmp /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-alerts.json" + ($('Parse Alert').first().json.isRecovery ? " && rmdir /tmp/triage-lock-" + $('Parse Alert').first().json.hostname + " 2>/dev/null; true" : "") }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ customFields: [{ '$type': 'StateIssueCustomField', name: 'State', value: { name: 'Open' } }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: 'Alert returned while issue was in To Verify state. Moving back to Open.

Rule: ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.ruleName + '
Severity: ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.severity + '
Time: ' + new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.command:
=HOSTNAME="{{ $('Parse Alert').first().json.hostname }}"
LOCK_DIR="/tmp/triage-lock-${HOSTNAME}"
if mkdir "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "PROCEED"
  (sleep 300 && rmdir "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null) </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1 &
else
  echo "LOCKED"
fi

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.text', body: '@openclaw use the exec tool to run: ./skills/correlated-triage/correlated-triage.sh "' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.burstHosts + '" "' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.burstRules + '" "' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.burstSeverities + '"', format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: '@openclaw use the exec tool to run: ./skills/correlated-triage/correlated-triage.sh "' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.burstHosts + '" "' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.burstRules + '" "' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.burstSeverities + '"' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.text', body: '@openclaw use the exec tool to run: FORCE_ESCALATE=true ./skills/escalate-to-claude.sh ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.existingIssueId + ' "Flapping infra alert: ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.ruleName + ' on ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.hostname + ' (flap #' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.flapCount + '). Auto-escalating for root cause investigation."', format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: '@openclaw use the exec tool to run: FORCE_ESCALATE=true ./skills/escalate-to-claude.sh ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.existingIssueId + ' "Flapping infra alert: ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.ruleName + ' on ' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.hostname + ' (flap #' + $('Parse Alert').first().json.flapCount + '). Auto-escalating for root cause investigation."', 'm.mentions': { user_ids: ['@openclaw:matrix.example.net'] } }) }}
